LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS EDWARD RITENOUR AND MICHELLE RITENOUR'S PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. THE COURT CONTINUES THE PETITION FOR ORDER CONFIRMING ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT THEREON FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES, AS IT RELATES TO RESPONDENTS DAVID FOLLNER AND 4F GROUP, TO JUNE 18, 2007. A SETTLEMENT IS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AS TO RESPONDENT JAVIER CHAVARRIA AND J.C. ENGINEERING AND THE PETITIONER WITHDRAWS THE PETITION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR 4780
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-20-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
